title: WebhookPayload.content_type should be an enum
description:
src/webhook.rs:15 — content_type is a String, matched against three literal values in handle_webhook (line 76-80):

    match payload.content_type.as_str() {
        "text/markdown" => ...
        "text/html" => ...
        _ => ...  // treated as text/plain
    }

This is stringly-typed — an invalid content_type like 'application/json' silently falls through to the text/plain path. A ContentType enum {Markdown, Html, Plain} with serde deserialization (and a default of Plain) would make the valid states explicit and eliminate the string comparison.

Impact: Any new content type added requires finding the match statement rather than getting a compiler error for a non-exhaustive match.
close_reason: String matching is appropriate for a private deserialization struct with 3 values
